recommended_courses.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate
recommended_courses.reason: Expand knowledge from developer tools to broader cloud architecture and system design patterns.

recommended_courses.title: NestJS Progressive Course
recommended_courses.reason: Learn structured, enterprise-grade backend development patterns using TypeScript.

recommended_projects: Real-time Collaboration Platform: Build a full-stack Next.js app using WebSocket/Socket.io, NestJS, and Redis caching.
Multi-tenant API Gateway: Develop a custom reverse-proxy API gateway with rate limiting and JWT auth using NestJS.
interview_preparation: Practice system design concepts like load balancing, caching strategies, and database indexing/sharding.
Review JavaScript/TypeScript event loop mechanics and concurrency patterns.
Prepare answers around serverless pros/cons and when to use containers instead of Lambda.

career_roadmap.week_1: Start the AWS Solutions Architect course and set up local NestJS template repository.
career_roadmap.week_2: Implement WebSocket real-time communication inside the Next.js/NestJS project.
career_roadmap.week_3: Integrate Redis caching and deploy the project using Terraform on AWS ECS.
career_roadmap.week_4: Refactor resume to include the new real-time project and prepare for mid-level system design queries.
